calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Arlene Howell, CSR# 2542 (212)

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Thomas Maxwell, Esq. for Petitioner: Cecilia Lam, present as Guardian ad litem for: Lewis Chen, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
Robert Gerhardt, Esq. is also present in court for Defendant: Valerie Hsiao.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $3,750.00
A net balance of $11,250.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Citibank, 1900 Noriega Street, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Continued To Jul-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Tom Maxwell, Esq. for Petitioner: Cecilia Lam, as Guardian ad litem for: Lewis Chen, a minor Claimant.
Elizabeth Bailey, Esq. for Plaintiff: Shao Yue Chen.
Robert Gerhardt, Eaq. for Defendant: Valerie Hsiao.
Pursuant to stipulation, matter is continued to July 19, 2007 at 9:00 A.M., for parties to reduced to writting of the settlement agreements, the understading and waiver, and file an Amended Petition to Compromise the Minor's Claim.

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Continued To Jul-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
